title: Radford's Artistic Bungalows, Design No. 5054 (floor plan)
creator: Radford Architectural Company
rightsholder_or_source: Internet Archive (Cornell University Library scan); published 1908, public domain by age
research_notes: Page n50 of scan; Design No. 5054. Single-floor plan with two porches; room dimensions labeled. Among the smallest plans in the book.
research_features: Very small/simple minimal test case: a 24'x24' square cottage with just kitchen, one bedroom, and a living room, plus a front and rear porch. Excellent 'uninteresting'/baseline plan for the corpus.
feature_highlights: only three rectangular rooms (kitchen, bedroom, living room)
small pantry with sink notch and a single closet
front and rear open porches with square-post colonnades
room names and dimensions lettered in each space
supported_examples: interior door openings and a sink fixture symbol
roadmap_examples: furniture/fixture placement (built-in porch seats, kitchen sink)

gap_features.why: front and rear porches are roofed-but-open colonnaded spaces, not fully wall-enclosed rooms
